title: Initialize Django project scaffold and configure settings
description: Create projects/hello_django/ directory with manage.py, hello_django/ package (settings.py, urls.py, wsgi.py, asgi.py, __init__.py). Configure INSTALLED_APPS, DATABASES (SQLite), MIDDLEWARE. Create root urls.py.

title: Create Django app 'hello' and register it
description: Create hello/ app directory with standard structure (__init__.py, views.py, urls.py, apps.py, models.py, tests.py, migrations/__init__.py). Add 'hello' to INSTALLED_APPS.

title: Implement 'Hello, World!' view
description: Write hello/views.py with a view function that takes HttpRequest and returns HttpResponse('Hello, World!').

title: Configure URL routing for root path
description: Create hello/urls.py mapping root path '' to the hello view. Update root urls.py to include hello.urls with path().

title: Create requirements.txt with dependencies
description: Create requirements.txt in projects/hello_django/ listing Django>=4.2.

title: Document setup and run instructions
description: Create README.md with installation steps (pip install -r requirements.txt), run command (python manage.py runserver), and access URL (http://localhost:8000/).
